title: [突發] 水樹奈奈嚟香港開演唱會

replies.msg:
動漫迷期待已久嘅聲優歌姫水樹奈奈終於駕臨香港！「NANA MIZUKI LIVE EXPRESS 2019+ HONG KONG」將於10月26日（星期六）喺九龍灣國際展貿中心匯星舉行！粉絲們絕對唔可以錯過今次 Tour 嘅唯一海外公演啊！即上 www.livenation.hk 了解節目及購票詳請。

Renowned anime voice actress & singer NANA MIZUKI announced her first live concert in Hong Kong on October 26 (Sat) at Star Hall, KITEC. This will be the only overseas show in her latest tour! Visit www.livenation.hk for more details.

NANA MIZUKI LIVE EXPRESS 2019+ HONG KONG
2019年10月26日（星期六）晚上7時45分 | Oct 26, 2019 (Sat) 7:45pm
九龍灣國際展貿中心匯星 Star Hall, KITEC
全坐位 All Seated HK$ 888 / 688
Live Nation Members Pre-sale: Aug 5 (Mon) 10am - 11:59pm
Public On-sale: Aug 6 (Tue) 10am
www.livenation.hk
